ast.name: error
ast.source: Error parsing workout from markdown body:
ast.target: 从Markdown正文解析训练时出错：

ast.source: Workout Journal: unable to register ribbon icon; continuing without ribbon icon.
ast.target: 训练日志：无法注册功能区图标；将继续运行而不显示功能区图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a name for this workout

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open an active session with an empty untitled routine
ast.target: 打开一个包含空白未命名训练流程的活跃训练会话

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: See your workout progress and statistics
ast.target: 查看您的训练进度和统计数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load previous targets and track a routine session
ast.target: 加载先前目标并跟踪训练流程会话

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a routine from a workout plan
ast.target: 从训练计划中选择一个训练流程

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 关于本次训练的附加说明

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set incomplete sets to target values and mark them complete.
ast.target: 将未完成的组数设置为目标值并标记为完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use completed set values as targets for next workout.
ast.target: 使用已完成的组数值作为下次训练的目标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose what to do with routine edits made during the workout.
ast.target: 选择如何处理训练期间对训练流程所做的编辑。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export your workouts from Strong: profile → settings → export data → "workouts csv"
ast.target: 从 Strong 导出您的训练数据：个人资料 → 设置 → 导出数据 → \"workouts csv\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write one Markdown note per workout into your workout folder.
ast.target: 将每次训练写入一个 Markdown 笔记到您的训练文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip workouts whose note file already exists (same date + name).
ast.target: 跳过笔记文件已存在的训练（相同日期 + 名称）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append imported sets to the performance tracking CSV.
ast.target: 将导入的组数追加到表现跟踪 CSV 文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create an exercise note for each unique exercise name found in workouts.csv. Notes are created with type 'other'; you can edit each note afterwards.
ast.target: 为 workouts.csv 中找到的每个唯一动作名称创建一个动作笔记。笔记类型为“其他”；您可以之后编辑每个笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No routine notes found. Create routine notes first.
ast.target: 未找到训练流程笔记。请先创建训练流程笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: YAML properties merged into the note frontmatter (plugin properties take precedence).
ast.target: YAML 属性将合并到笔记前置信息中（插件属性优先）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown text appended beneath the generated note content.
ast.target: Markdown 文本将追加在生成的笔记内容下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where workout files will be created
ast.target: 将创建训练文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含动作定义笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含训练流程定义笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder containing workout plan definition notes
ast.target: 包含训练计划定义笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CSV file used for previous values and target progression
ast.target: 用于存储先前值和目标进阶的 CSV 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sync frontmatter when workout files are manually edited
ast.target: 手动编辑训练文件时自动同步前置信息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait time (in milliseconds) after stopping typing before syncing frontmatter
ast.target: 停止输入后同步前置信息的等待时间（毫秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Global weight unit used across logging and stats
ast.target: 记录和统计中使用的全局重量单位

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rest timer duration in seconds started automatically when a set is checked off (0 to disable)
ast.target: 组数完成后自动开始的休息计时器时长（秒）（0 表示禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vibrate when checking off a set (mobile only)
ast.target: 完成组数时振动（仅限移动端）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Play a sound when checking off a set

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vibrate when a rest timer completes (mobile only)
ast.target: 休息计时器完成时振动（仅限移动端）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Play a sound when a rest timer completes
ast.target: 休息计时器完成时播放声音

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Import workout history exported from the strong app (workouts.csv).
ast.target: 导入从 Strong 应用导出的训练历史记录（workouts.csv）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create and manage note-based workout plans built from routines
ast.target: 创建和管理基于笔记的、由训练流程构建的训练计划

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extra frontmatter and body text appended to each generated note type
ast.target: 追加到每种生成笔记类型的额外前置信息和正文文本

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: How did the workout feel? Any observations?
ast.target: 训练感觉如何？有什么观察记录？

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 例如：胸部、肱三头肌、肩部

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: ## 我的章节\n\n此处为自定义内容…

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Workout Journal: icon 'biceps-flexed' unavailable, falling back to 'calendar'.
ast.target: 训练日志：图标 'biceps-flexed' 不可用，回退到 'calendar'。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a workout name and add at least one exercise
ast.target: 请输入训练名称并添加至少一个练习

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill in name and muscle groups

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please add at least one exercise

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please add at least one routine.
ast.target: 请添加至少一个日常训练。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot delete: plan file path is unknown.
ast.target: 无法删除：计划文件路径未知。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🏋️ Rest complete! Time for the next set.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This command can only be used in a Markdown view.
ast.target: 此命令只能在 Markdown 视图中使用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active session. Start one from a routine or plan first.
ast.target: 没有活动会话。请先从日常训练或计划中启动一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This file does not contain valid workout data
ast.target: 此文件不包含有效的训练数据

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有要结束的活动会话。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a routine or plan note first.
ast.target: 请先打开一个日常训练或计划笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Current note is not a workout exercise, routine, or plan note.
ast.target: 当前笔记不是训练练习、日常训练或计划笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Current file is not a valid workout file.
ast.target: 当前文件不是有效的训练文件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open active workout session in popout
ast.target: 在弹出窗口中打开活动训练会话

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从当前训练创建日常训练

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将设置模板迁移至笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a workout template to quickly log:
ast.target: 选择一个训练模板以快速记录：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Import your workout history exported from the strong app.
ast.target: 导入您从 Strong 应用导出的训练历史记录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Load a workouts.csv file to see a preview.
ast.target: 加载一个 workouts.csv 文件以查看预览。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Exercise templates are legacy definitions stored in plugin settings. Use 'Migrate templates to notes' on the main settings page to convert them to full exercise notes.
ast.target: 动作模板是存储在插件设置中的旧版定义。请在主设置页面使用“将模板迁移至笔记”将其转换为完整的动作笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Routine templates are legacy definitions stored in plugin settings. Use 'Migrate templates to notes' on the main settings page to convert them into full routine notes that support detailed per-exercise set configuration.
ast.target: 例程模板是存储在插件设置中的旧版定义。请在主设置页面使用“将模板迁移至笔记”将其转换为支持详细按动作组配置的完整例程笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Plans combine multiple routines into a training program. Each plan is stored as a note.
ast.target: 计划将多个例程组合成一个训练计划。每个计划都存储为一个笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Extra frontmatter properties (YAML) and body text appended to each generated note type. Plugin-managed properties (wj-id, wj-name, wj-type, etc.) always take precedence over template frontmatter.
ast.target: 附加到每种生成笔记类型的额外前置属性（YAML）和正文文本。插件管理的属性（wj-id, wj-name, wj-type 等）始终优先于模板前置属性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure folders, tracking behavior, and library tools for Workout journal.
ast.target: 为 Workout Journal 配置文件夹、跟踪行为和库工具。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Edit rest timer for this exercise
ast.target: 编辑此动作的休息计时器
